Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jody C. Weiner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Briarcliff Wine Group, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Russell D. Pollock, Chief Operating Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Sapphire Wines, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, Emerald Wines, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, Sapphire Brands Limited, a business entity, form unknown, The Saint James Company, a North Carolina coroporation or The Saint James EOS Wine Company, a California corporation.
Defaults were entered against defendants on August 17, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Briarcliff Wine Group, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants Sapphire Wines, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, Emerald Wines, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, Sapphire Brands Limited, a business entity, form unknown, The Saint James Company, a North Carolina coroporation or The Saint James EOS Wine Company, a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,987,334.35.
Prejudgment Interest - $69,827.89.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $640.00.

Total - $2,057,802.24.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
